ucs.title: [LLM] POLONIUM CreepyDrive/CreepySnail C2 — non-Office process beaconing to graph.microsoft.com or Dropbox API
ucs.description: Hunts for POLONIUM's signature CreepyDrive (OneDrive/Graph API C2) and CreepySnail (PowerShell) implants, which abuse legitimate Microsoft Graph and Dropbox APIs as bidirectional C2 channels (T1102.002). Detection focuses on unusual processes (powershell, custom binaries, mshta, rundll32) reaching graph.microsoft.com / api.dropboxapi.com / content.dropboxapi.com — a tradecraft fingerprint Microsoft specifically attributed to POLONIUM in their June 2022 report.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest IN ("graph.microsoft.com","login.microsoftonline.com","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.onedrive.com")) by All_Traffic.src host All_Traffic.app All_Traffic.process_name _time span=1h
| `drop_dm_object_name("All_Traffic")`
| where NOT match(process_name, "(?i)(onedrive|teams|outlook|winword|excel|powerpnt|onenote|msedge|chrome|firefox|iexplore|olk|skype|svchost)\.exe$")
| join type=inner host process_name [
   | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process IN ("*Invoke-RestMethod*graph.microsoft.com*","*Invoke-WebRequest*graph.microsoft.com*","*api.dropboxapi.com*","*content.dropboxapi.com*","*Bearer*","*/me/drive/root:/*","*/me/drive/items/*")) by Processes.dest Processes.process Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.user
   | `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")`
   | rename dest as host]
| stats count min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(dest) as dest values(dest_port) as dest_port values(process) as process values(parent_process_name) as parent_process_name values(user) as user by host process_name
| where count >= 3
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
| eval threat_actor="POLONIUM (Plaid Rain)", implant_family="CreepyDrive/CreepySnail"
ucs.rationale: CreepyDrive (OneDrive/Graph API for C2 reads/writes) and CreepySnail (PowerShell variant) are POLONIUM-unique implants documented by Microsoft Threat Intelligence in June 2022. Other Iran-aligned clusters (MuddyWater, APT34) lean on different C2 (DNS, web shells, RMM); POLONIUM's distinguishing fingerprint is non-Office processes calling Graph /me/drive endpoints with Bearer tokens against attacke

ucs.title: [LLM] POLONIUM reverse SSH tunnel via Plink with hard-coded creds (Mekman/TunnelMain proxy)
ucs.description: POLONIUM operators consistently deploy Plink (PuTTY's plink.exe) and custom tunnelers (Mekman, TunnelMain) to establish reverse SSH tunnels back to attacker VPS infrastructure for proxying RDP/SMB into Israeli victims (T1090). This UC catches plink.exe / ssh.exe spawned with reverse-port-forward (-R) flags, password-on-CLI (-pw), and outbound 22/443 to non-corporate IPs — a pattern repeatedly observed in ESET and Microsoft reporting on POLONIUM's hands-on-keyboard phase.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("plink.exe","ssh.exe","putty.exe") OR Processes.original_file_name IN ("plink.exe","ssh.exe")) AND (Processes.process="*-R *" OR Processes.process="*-pw *" OR Processes.process="*-N*" OR Processes.process="*-ssh*" OR Processes.process="*StrictHostKeyChecking=no*") by host Processes.process_name Processes.dest
| `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")`
| rex field=process "-R\s+(?<rport>\d{2,5}):(?<rhost>[\w\.-]+):(?<lport>\d{2,5})"
| rex field=process "-pw\s+(?<pw_on_cli>\S+)"
| rex field=process "\s(?<ssh_user>\S+)@(?<ssh_dst>(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3})"
| where isnotnull(rport) OR isnotnull(pw_on_cli) OR isnotnull(ssh_dst)
| join type=left host [
   | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest_port IN (22,443,80,2222,8443) AND All_Traffic.action=allowed AND All_Traffic.dest_category!="internal") by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.dest_port All_Traffic.app
   | `drop_dm_object_name("All_Traffic")`
   | rename src as host]
| eval threat_actor="POLONIUM (Plaid Rain) — G1005", technique="T1090 Reverse SSH tunnel"
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
| table firstTime lastTime host process_name parent user process rport rhost lport ssh_user ssh_dst pw_on_cli dest dest_port threat_actor technique
ucs.kql:
// POLONIUM reverse-SSH tunneling (Plink / OpenSSH) — pivoting & proxy stage
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName in~ ("plink.exe","ssh.exe","putty.exe","pscp.exe") 
     or ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName in~ ("plink.exe","ssh.exe")
     or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-pw ","StrictHostKeyChecking=no") and ProcessCommandLine has "-R ")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-R "," -pw ","-N ","-ssh ","StrictHostKeyChecking=no","-D ")
| extend RPort = extract(@"-R\s+(\d{2,5}):", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend RemoteHost = extract(@"-R\s+\d{2,5}:([\w\.-]+):\d{2,5}", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend SshUser = extract(@"\s([A-Za-z0-9_\-\.]+)@((?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3})", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend SshDst  = extract(@"\s([A-Za-z0-9_\-\.]+)@((?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3})", 2, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend PwOnCli = ProcessCommandLine has " -pw "
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public" and RemotePort in (22, 443, 2222, 8443)
    | summarize FirstNet=min(Timestamp), LastNet=max(Timestamp), Bytes=sum(toint(coalesce(tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).bytes_out),"0"))), DstIPs=make_set(RemoteIP,10), DstPorts=make_set(RemotePort,5)
        by DeviceId, InitiatingProcessFileName
) on $left.DeviceId == $right.DeviceId and $left.FileName == $right.InitiatingProcessFileName
| where isnotempty(RPort) or PwOnCli or isnotempty(SshDst) or isnotempty(DstIPs)
| extend ThreatActor="POLONIUM (Plaid Rain) — G1005", Tooling="Plink / Mekman / TunnelMain reverse-SSH proxy"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, InitiatingProcessParentFileName, ProcessCommandLine, RPort, RemoteHost, SshUser, SshDst, PwOnCli, DstIPs, DstPorts, FirstNet, LastNet, ThreatActor, Tooling
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: POLONIUM differs from peer Iran-aligned actors (MuddyWater favours RMM like ScreenConnect; APT34 uses DNS tunneling) by relying heavily on Plink-based reverse SSH tunnels and bespoke tunnelers (Mekman, TunnelMain) — documented by ESET (Oct 2022) and Microsoft. The combination of plink.exe with `-R` reverse-forward, `-pw` cleartext password on the CLI, and `StrictHostKeyChecking=no` against an exte
